notes:
Smart TRF Handling (Fixed + Enhanced)
Supports both typed and scanned TRFs
Recognizes valid formats: OR + 10 digits and TRF + 10 digits
Automatically triggers Scan Order/TRF when valid format is detected
Eliminates missed scans due to timing issues (now retries reliably)
Smart Enter (Context-Aware Keybind)
Enter key now intelligently performs actions based on workflow state:
TRF field → triggers Scan Order/TRF

Limited to once per DE1 cycle to prevent accidental spam

Smart Workflow Progression
Improved step-by-step automation:
TRF → BCK → Waybill → Patient Info
TRF no longer prematurely advances when typing
Next-step assist is now smoother and more responsive

Kit Timing & Session Tracking (Fixed)
Accurate kit timing start and completion detection
Fixed average time calculation
Session stats now update correctly across multiple kits
Performance & Stability
Reduced unnecessary background processing
Fixed missed-event issues (no longer relies on single poll timing)
Improved consistency of automation triggers

Reliability Fixes
Fixed Smart Enter incorrectly triggering wrong actions
Fixed Search button targeting the wrong UI element
Fixed TRF auto-scan not triggering for manually typed values
Fixed inconsistent detection of field changes.
